venues.name: Semi Semi
venues.description: Brisbane's bingsu breakthrough. Korean shaved ice desserts finally get the spotlight they deserve beyond Sunnybank.
venues.mustTry: Taro and black sesame bingsu, Earl Grey and Thai tea varieties, plant-based coconut mango chocolate

venues.name: Idle
venues.description: The evolution of beloved Agnes Bakery. Sleek Tamsin Johnson design meets next-level baked goods and a coal-fired rotisserie.
venues.mustTry: Baghdad eggs with smoked almond crumb and labneh, cross-laminated pain au chocolat, tonka bean kouign-amann, coal-fired rotisserie chicken

venues.name: Coffee Anthology
venues.description: Named 8th best coffee shop in the world in 2025. Multi-roaster approach with Mecca coffee, pastries from Fika, cookies from Butter Boy.
venues.mustTry: Rotating coffee roasts matched to brewing methods, caramelised banana rice pudding, pandan waffles, croissant eggs benedict

venues.name: Cafe Disco
venues.description: Bright yellow facade, impossible to miss. Bangladeshi-Australian fusion that Gerald Ong called his favorite bite of the year.
venues.mustTry: Bangladeshi-inspired breakfast dishes, lunch specials blending two cultures, evening cocktails

venues.name: Alby's
venues.description: From hospo veteran Daniel Bowles. Single O coffee meets trending treats in a charming suburban setting.
venues.mustTry: Beef rendang toastie (the icon), iced tiramisu drink with cold vanilla foam

venues.name: Landing Bakery
venues.description: Coastal gem from Anytime Coffee and Riser Bread alumni. Architectural finesse meets creative pastries that are both classic and clever.
venues.mustTry: Gochujang scrolls, citrus morning buns, perfectly seasoned sausage rolls

venues.name: Speed Dial
venues.description: One of Brisbane's tiniest and best new cafes, operating from a 30sqm shipping container. Yes, it's in the Bunnings carpark.
venues.mustTry: Coffee Supreme's South blend, toasties with marinara dipping sauce, daily batch brew, matcha drinks

venues.name: Smidge Bakery
venues.description: Self-proclaimed home of "Perth's best cinny scrolls" and they might be right. Selling 20 trays a day in their new bigger space.
venues.mustTry: Cinnamon scrolls (the legend), choc caramel brownies, salted Caramilk cookies, sangas

venues.name: So What Stereo
venues.description: Brisbane's first Thai vinyl cafe and one of 2025's biggest success stories. Hidden in The Valley, this mid-century gem blends retro whimsy with Thai street food brilliance.
venues.mustTry: Khao soi, congee, kao lao sets, kai kon (Thai-style scrambled eggs), Single O coffee

venues.name: Baking 101
venues.description: Home of 2025's It Baked Good: the cinnamon scroll that sold out in three hours. Classic vibes with red curtains, chandeliers, and piano jazz.
venues.mustTry: Signature cinnamon scroll with vanilla cream (THE ONE), Scent of Stanmore carrot cake
